diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help?
[Caller] There's a 5-star in my wish history that I don't remember pulling. Raiden Shogun on March 2nd. I never got her.
[Agent] OK, UID please?
[Caller] 703321876.
[Agent] Pulling that up. Yes, I see — Raiden Shogun on March 2, 2026, on the Character Event Wish.
[Caller] That's impossible. I've never had Raiden. Can you check if someone else accessed my account?
[Agent] I can only see the wish record. To check security events I'd need to escalate, but the wish itself is confirmed by the system.
[Caller] So where is she?
[Agent] I can check your character roster. One moment. I don't see Raiden Shogun on your roster. It's possible the character was sold for Stardust after the wish, but I can't confirm that from here.
[Caller] I would never sell a 5-star. Something is wrong.
[Agent] I understand. Unfortunately without escalation I can't tell you more. I'll make a note on the account. Is there anything else?
[Caller] I guess not. This is really frustrating.
[Agent] I understand. Have a good day.
